title: teucrium antiatlanticum
intro: Teucrium antiatlanticum, also known as the Atlantic germander or teucrium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium antiatlanticum include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and neuroprotective properties. Herbal preparations of Teucrium antiatlanticum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
